description: What purports to be a copy of an excerpt from a letter of appointment to the attendant of the synagogue at Ezra's tomb north of Baṣra in Iraq issued by the exilarch Daniʾel b. Elʿazar b. Hibatallāh. (Information from Goitein, Med. Soc., 2:90 at n. 122) Note: this shelfmark is not in FGP.
description_he: מכתב בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic מהמאה ה-13. מוחזק בהספרייה הבריטית.
